p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: NSPI is fully compliant with regulations for emissions and management of materials related to its operations. In producing safe and reliable electricity at the lowest cost for Nova Scotians, NSPI considers efficiency of operations among other factors in achieving sustainable business solutions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Using stack testing results as an emissions factor after several years of consistent stack testing data has indicated that our emissions are higher than published emissions factors.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM10 and PM2.5 values are calculated using published emissions factors that are a fraction of TPM emissions. While the published emissions factors for PM10 and PM2.5 remain unchanged, NSPI began using stack testing results to determine TPM emissions this year after it was discovered that stack testing results are consistent and are greater than published TPM emissions factors.
